assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes notifications including auto-upgrade notifications, available version updates, end-of-life warnings, and security patches in the triage matrix and script

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns security patches with CVE 7.0+ to CRITICAL priority and new version available to MEDIUM/LOW priority, establishing clear urgency hierarchy

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response specifically addresses EOL warnings with timeframes (<30 days = CRITICAL, 30-90 days = HIGH) and includes upgrade planning actions

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: While response mentions auto-upgrade notifications and assigns them HIGH priority for production, it doesn't specifically mention triggering pre-upgrade checklist execution

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response assigns security patches to CRITICAL priority with 24-48 hour timeframe and mentions immediate maintenance window planning

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response correctly categorizes 'Available version updates (non-security)' as MEDIUM priority for planning ahead and 'General availability announcements' as LOW priority informational

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events, focusing instead on email processing and webhook integrations

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Review release notes for breaking changes' as an action item in the HIGH priority section
